name: HMS Skokholm (T 376)
events: 9 Feb 1944 HMS Una (T/L. P.S. Thirsk, RNR) conducted A/S exercises off Stornoway with HMS Skokholm (T/Lt. T. Costley, RNVR) and HMS Grain (A/Skr.Lt. E.J.L. Davies, RNR). (1)
13 Feb 1944 HMS Una (T/L. P.S. Thirsk, RNR) conducted A/S exercises off Stornoway with HMS Skokholm (T/Lt. T. Costley, RNVR) and HMS Gulland (T/Lt. C.W. Jobson, RNVR). (1)
14 Feb 1944 HMS Una (T/L. P.S. Thirsk, RNR) conducted A/S exercises off Stornoway with HMS Skokholm (T/Lt. T. Costley, RNVR) and HMS Gulland (T/Lt. C.W. Jobson, RNVR). (1)
16 Feb 1944 HMS Una (T/L. P.S. Thirsk, RNR) conducted A/S exercises off Stornoway with HMS Skokholm (T/Lt. T. Costley, RNVR). (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
